title: Cyclea insularis
intro: Cyclea insularis, also known as Insular Cyclea, is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae, native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can aid in the treatment of various diseases such as fever, respiratory infections, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Cyclea insularis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Cyclea insularis is commonly used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
